prestazioni: Engine: AM2 7.3L naturally aspirated V12 (derived from the Aston Martin One-77's *AE31* block) with forged internals, including billet crankshaft (Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, Mahle Motorsport forged pistons, and titanium valves from Del West). Upgraded to 800+ HP via a bespoke *Cosworth* ECU calibration with individual throttle body (ITB) optimization, 12-stage dry-sump lubrication system (Titan Motorsport), and a custom *Akrapovič* titanium exhaust with 120mm carbon-fiber tips and electronically controlled butterfly valves for backpressure tuning.

Forced Induction (Optional Track Build): *Garrett GTX5533R* turbocharger (single-turbo conversion) with a *Tial* 60mm wastegate, *Pectel* SQ6M standalone ECU, and *Radium Engineering* port injection system (supplementing the stock direct injection) for methanol-water injection (AEM 50-50 mix). Intercooler: *PWR* 4.5-core bar-and-plate unit with dual *SPAL* 16" fans and a *Mocal* oil cooler for the turbo system. Boost target: 1.2 bar (17.4 psi) with 98 RON fuel, yielding ~1,100 HP at 7,800 RPM.

Drivetrain & Chassis: *Xtrac* 6-speed sequential gearbox (P1227) with a *Tilton* triple-plate carbon clutch and *AP Racing* 380mm carbon-carbon discs (6-piston calipers). Suspension: *Öhlins* TTX46 coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression), *Tillet* carbon-fiber seats with *Schroth* 6-point harnesses, and a *Multimatic* DSSV spool-valve damper system for track-only sessions. Differential: *Quaife* ATB helical LSD with 45% lockup under load.
estetica: Aerodynamics: *RML Group* (Aston Martin’s in-house motorsport division) carbon-fiber aero package, including a *Gurney flap*-equipped front splitter with *NACA ducts* for brake cooling, a *swan-neck* rear wing (adjustable via *Motec* actuators), and a *diffuser* with active *blown flaps* (pneumatic, linked to the ECU for drag reduction at high speeds). Underbody: Full *Venturi* tunnel with *Vortex generators* for ground-effect downforce (target: 1,200 kg at 200 km/h).

Bodywork: *BAC Mono*-inspired carbon-fiber body panels (pre-preg autoclave construction) with *3M* 1080 vinyl wrap in *Aston Martin Racing Green* with *gunmetal* accents. *HRE* FF16 flow-formed wheels (20" front, 21" rear) wrapped in *Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R* tires (265/35 R20 front, 325/30 R21 rear). *Brembo* gold-painted calipers with *Pagid* RS29 brake pads for track use.

Interior: *Sparco* QRT-K carbon-fiber seats with *Alcantara* suede upholstery (fireproofed to FIA standards), *Momo* *Prototipo* steering wheel with *Motec* C127 dash display (integrated lap timer, G-force meter, and tire pressure monitoring). *Roll cage*: *Custom Cages* T45 steel (chromoly) with *Schroth* harness bar and *OMP* fire suppression system (plumbed to the engine bay and cockpit). *Audio*: *Bowers & Wilkins* 1,000W Diamond Series speakers (replaced with *Race Technology* DL1 data logger for track days).
